Hi there and welcome back. We're going to take a quick look at three examples of these three post webinar templates. So the first one is for those who showed up live but didn't buy. That was the Fab 5 template and we sent this one out as part of 10x freelance copywriter 2018. So remember this is for those who stayed right till the end of the webinar. So we're not sending them more information we're really reflecting back their intent and then giving them urgency around the bonus which they are exclusively empowered to get because they stayed till the end. So subject line the link we just shared in your secret 10x freelance freelance copywriter bonus. So even in that subject line it's all about the bonus. One, you're a hella ambitious freelance copywriter who's ready to make this your year. No more excuses, no more time spent on the verge you're gonna do it and you're gonna be freaking happy and proud you did. You want the training, coaching and accountability to smash through your plateaus slash your learning curve and enjoy an accelerated descent to the top of the freelance copy game. And finally you've earned your access to the secret because you stay till the end bonus that no one else will know existed. So this is really the key piece here. We're talking of course about the epic five hour proposal bootcamp. So now we're really selling the value of the bonus. So really really pumping the value of this bonus. All right so the second one is the no-goes shall pass or remember these are people who ghosted they didn't show up they did sign up for the webinar but they didn't show up and we really need to reorient them around the launch not make them feel like you know it's too late and that they missed the boat and that they're going to just disqualify themselves but this is about having empathy around them missing and then being of service and getting them back on track and we're going to use the PASO formula for doing it. So here we go this was from Amy Porterfields Digital Course Academy launch in January 2019 and it starts you are this close to joining me on our live masterclass together but it looks like something got in the way so we're calling it out right away but without blame without painting on the guilt too thick but it looks like something got in the way maybe the ultra demanding boss or client through a last minute curveball at you maybe you can help but bust your two episode limit of Riverdale no spoilers please maybe the kids the human or furry kind needed some extra love today whatever happened we missed you so we're deflecting the blame and the reason we're doing this is because we want to maintain the idea or or assumption that they actually really still wanted to be there that they're still very much interested in what this webinar is and has to say and has to teach and more importantly you missed the kind of training that could totally help you avoid those situations from happening in the future in the future so now we're just agitating by reflecting the cost of missing the webinar because when you successfully build and launch a profitable digital course that uncouples you from the time for money trap you can afford to take more time off you can afford to only work with clients you love and who respect your time you can afford to indulge in the extra guilt-free episode of whatever takes up space on your current currently watching list so we want to do here wherever possible is reflect the benefits of your product as things that would help them avoid these potential reasons for missing the webinar in the first place so a little bit of a mirroring effect here and a little bit of an irony of the very things that made them miss the thing that could have helped them avoid it in the first place or make the webinar in the first place so yeah there's quite a bit on the line here and if it's cool with you I'd love to give you a second chance to make it happen so now we're coaching those next steps with a binary choice the first one is a replay which is available now the second one is registering for any remaining live presentations you have and either one is cool of course but what we really want to do is have them make a choice between these two not a choice between one and no choice at all or one or you know choosing not to participate in the launch anymore and there is a bit of a convenience anchor here right especially if they weren't able to make a live session before all of a sudden the replay may have more value than registering for another live one either way please make it a priority over the next 24 hours and then we just close with some empathy but also some direct direct and clear authoritative language I totally get what it feels like to be crazy busy and super overwhelmed but at the same time building a digital course business like I'll teach you on this masterclass is the way to entangle you from that mess if you're ready to take stand for yourself your schedule and your sanity I can't wait to see you on the next live training or replay cool alright so the last one is the traffic light system this is for those people who left early and we're really kind of looping them all in the same bucket and giving them intent appropriate call to actions and having them reorient themselves around what that intention is so it starts off you did it thanks so much for joining me on our recent masterclass the training has literally been years and making and I'm so grateful I could share it with incredible soon to be digital course creators like you so step one we do know that they did show up so we're reflecting that back at the very least so now you might be wondering cool but what's next Amy and then we pivot and here's the thing it all depends on you option one if you're entirely committed to creating and launching your profitable course this year then I'd love nothing more than to meet you inside module one and the private Facebook group in the next few minutes we're really future pacing what's possible for people if they are almost ready to go we're giving them that extra nudge yes this launch promo will be running a few for a few more days but if you already know it's time for you to create and launch your course then why waste another moment thinking about it when you could start crossing exciting to do is off your course creation project list so this is a really future pacing the ownership experience for those that are most ready with a green heart and then this call to action takes them either to the sales page or a checkup page option number two if it sounds exciting but you're still in thinking about it mode and I get it while the financial investment is super affordable for this type of program we will be asking you to invest time energy focus and creating and launching your course over the next few months this might be a pretty big departure from your normal day-to-day routine and even though the prospect of finally separating yourself from the time for money trap is exciting you still need a bit more time to decide if you're ready to take that leap if that's you I'd love it if you could rewatch the masterclass so the tone here is confident and empathetic we're really trying to mirror the internal dialogue that would be going through the head of someone who's on defense and our call to action for this intention is to rewatch that masterclass just reabsorb the information or watch all of it this time around as opposed to checking out early and that's going to give them just a base for making the right decision or making the decision that makes sense for them all right and then we give them a little bit of instructions on the frame of mind to be announced they watch it except instead of taking notes just see if you can picture yourself doing the things we talk about like recording your course launching with webinars if things resonate and you feel a big yes rumbling in your gut then I'd love to welcome you inside Digital Course Academy later today so are really taking a leadership stance and encouraging decision-making even if the action is rewatching the replay and finally option 3 you enjoyed the masterclass but you're absolutely sure you don't want to create a course this year notice the language absolutely sure you don't want to do it and even in unsubscribe link there's a bit of a risk aversion or a loss aversion here here's a link to unsubscribe from all DCA updates bonuses and discounts so we want to make it very easy to be able to opt out you know this option is just as clear as the other two but we also want to make it very hard to opt out because they don't want to lose the potential to get bonuses and discounts and what we really want to do is encourage the action of having someone consciously decide not to opt out because in deciding not to opt out there's an implicit decision made there that they are still at the very least interested and it encourages you know one of these first two options so don't be afraid to give the opt out option make it hard for them to want to opt out but have it there because ultimately you do want them to make a decision because that's going to help you orient them for the rest of the launch and get them back on track and then really just close by borderline insisting that they make a decision so whatever you decide I highly encourage you to dig deep and make a decision today the ROI on sitting on the fence is no the ROI on powerfully moving forward with whatever feels most right can be life-changing all my best Amy so there we go three templates to send in the immediate post webinar for three different segments I know this one's a lot of work but that is really the prime buying window in your launch and you really want to be able to talk to each audience in a way that is going to most bring them towards that conversion so give that a shot and I'll see you in the next video
